title: Zillow Group Class C Capital Stock (Z) Earnings Report Dates & Earnings Forecasts
text: Zillow Group Q2 2024 Earnings Results and Analysis. Zillow reported Q2 revenue of $572 million, up 13% year over year. Q2 Residential Revenue was $409 million, up 8% year over year. Despite the positive revenue growth, Zillow Group Inc reported a GAAP net loss of $17 million for Q2. For Q2 2024, analysts estimated EPS of $0.35 and revenue of $563M. Over the prior year, Zillow had beaten EPS estimates consistently and beaten revenue estimates frequently. The earnings call highlighted Zillow's continued investment in AI-driven productivity gains, transforming into an AI-powered real estate platform.
